verses.latin_vulgate: Respondens autem Baldad Suhites, dixit :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֭יַּעַן בִּלְדַּ֥ד הַשֻּׁחִ֗י וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then Baldad the Suhite answered, and said:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin vastasi Bildad Suasta ja sanoi:
verses.king_james: Then answered Bildad the Shuhite, and said,

verses.latin_vulgate: Usque ad quem finem verba jactabitis ?  intelligite prius, et sic loquamur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַד־אָ֤נָה ׀ תְּשִׂימ֣וּן קִנְצֵ֣י לְמִלִּ֑ין תָּ֝בִ֗ינוּ וְאַחַ֥ר נְדַבֵּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: How long will you throw out words? understand first, and so let us speak.
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska te lakkaatte puhumasta? ymmärtäkäät ensin, ja puhukaamme sitte.
verses.king_james: How long will it be ere ye make an end of words? mark, and afterwards we will speak.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quare reputati sumus ut jumenta,  et sorduimus coram vobis ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַ֭דּוּעַ נֶחְשַׁ֣בְנוּ כַבְּהֵמָ֑ה נִ֝טְמִ֗ינוּ בְּעֵינֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Why are we reputed as beasts, and counted vile before you?
verses.finnish_biblia: Miksi me pidetään niinkuin juhdat, ja olemme niin saastaiset teidän silmäinne edestä?
verses.king_james: Wherefore are we counted as beasts, and reputed vile in your sight?

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui perdis animam tuam in furore tuo,  numquid propter te derelinquetur terra,  et transferentur rupes de loco suo ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: טֹרֵ֥ף נַפְשׁ֗וֹ בְּאַ֫פּ֥וֹ הַֽ֭לְמַעַנְךָ תֵּעָ֣זַב אָ֑רֶץ וְיֶעְתַּק־צ֝֗וּר מִמְּקֹמֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou that destroyest thy soul in thy fury, shall the earth be forsaken for thee, and shall rocks be removed out of their place?
verses.finnish_biblia: Tahdotkos revetä kiukussas? luuletkos, että maa sinun tähtes hyljätään ja kallio siirretään siastansa?
verses.king_james: He teareth himself in his anger: shall the earth be forsaken for thee? and shall the rock be removed out of his place?

verses.latin_vulgate: Nonne lux impii extinguetur,  nec splendebit flamma ignis ejus ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּ֤ם א֣וֹר רְשָׁעִ֣ים יִדְעָ֑ךְ וְלֹא־יִ֝גַּ֗הּ שְׁבִ֣יב אִשּֽׁוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Shall not the light of the wicked be extinguished, and the flame of his fire not shine?
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumalattoman valkeus pitää myös sammutettaman, ja hänen valkiansa kipinä ei pidä paistaman.
verses.king_james: Yea, the light of the wicked shall be put out, and the spark of his fire shall not shine.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lux obtenebrescet in tabernaculo illius,  et lucerna quæ super eum est extinguetur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: א֭וֹר חָשַׁ֣ךְ בְּאׇהֳל֑וֹ וְ֝נֵר֗וֹ עָלָ֥יו יִדְעָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The light shall be dark in his tabernacle, and the lamp that is over him, shall be put out.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen majassansa pitää valkeus tuleman pimeydeksi, ja hänen kynttilänsä pitää siinä sammutettaman.
verses.king_james: The light shall be dark in his tabernacle, and his candle shall be put out with him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Arctabuntur gressus virtutis ejus,  et præcipitabit eum consilium suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֵ֭צְרוּ צַעֲדֵ֣י אוֹנ֑וֹ וְֽתַשְׁלִיכֵ֥הוּ עֲצָתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The step of his strength shall be straitened, and his own counsel shall cast him down headlong.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen voimansa askeleet pitää ahdistettaman; ja hänen neuvonsa pitää hänen maahan sysäämän.
verses.king_james: The steps of his strength shall be straitened, and his own counsel shall cast him down.

verses.latin_vulgate: Immisit enim in rete pedes suos,  et in maculis ejus ambulat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־שֻׁלַּ֣ח בְּרֶ֣שֶׁת בְּרַגְלָ֑יו וְעַל־שְׂ֝בָכָ֗ה יִתְהַלָּֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For he hath thrust his feet into a net, and walketh in its meshes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä hän on viety jalkoinensa paulaan, ja vaeltaa verkossa.
verses.king_james: For he is cast into a net by his own feet, and he walketh upon a snare.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tenebitur planta illius laqueo,  et exardescet contra eum sitis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֹאחֵ֣ז בְּעָקֵ֣ב פָּ֑ח יַחֲזֵ֖ק עָלָ֣יו צַמִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sole of his foot shall be held in a snare, and thirst shall burn against him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Paula pitää pitämän hänen kantapäänsä, ja ryövärit pitää hänen käsittämän.
verses.king_james: The gin shall take him by the heel, and the robber shall prevail against him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abscondita est in terra pedica ejus,  et decipula illius super semitam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: טָמ֣וּן בָּאָ֣רֶץ חַבְל֑וֹ וּ֝מַלְכֻּדְתּ֗וֹ עֲלֵ֣י נָתִֽיב׃
verses.douay_rheims: A gin is hidden for him in the earth, and his trap upon the path.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen paulansa on viritetty maan päälle, ja hänen satimensa hänen polullensa.
verses.king_james: The snare is laid for him in the ground, and a trap for him in the way.

verses.latin_vulgate: Undique terrebunt eum formidines,  et involvent pedes ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: סָ֭בִיב בִּעֲתֻ֣הוּ בַלָּה֑וֹת וֶהֱפִיצֻ֥הוּ לְרַגְלָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Fears shall terrify him on every side, and shall entangle his feet.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikin tahoin pitää kauhistukset häntä peljättämän, ja hänen jalkansa eksyttämän.
verses.king_james: Terrors shall make him afraid on every side, and shall drive him to his feet.

verses.latin_vulgate: Attenuetur fame robur ejus,  et inedia invadat costas illius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהִי־רָעֵ֥ב אֹנ֑וֹ וְ֝אֵ֗יד נָכ֥וֹן לְצַלְעֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let his strength be wasted with famine, and let hunger invade his ribs.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nälkä pitää oleman hänen tavaransa, ja onnettomuus pitää oleman valmistettu hänen kylkeensä.
verses.king_james: His strength shall be hungerbitten, and destruction shall be ready at his side.

verses.latin_vulgate: Devoret pulchritudinem cutis ejus ;  consumat brachia illius primogenita mors.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֹ֭אכַל בַּדֵּ֣י עוֹר֑וֹ יֹאכַ֥ל בַּ֝דָּ֗יו בְּכ֣וֹר מָֽוֶת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let it devour the beauty of his skin, let the firstborn death consume his arms.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen nahkansa vahvuus pitää kulutettaman, ja hänen väkevyytensä pitää kuoleman esikoisen syömän.
verses.king_james: It shall devour the strength of his skin: even the firstborn of death shall devour his strength.

verses.latin_vulgate: Avellatur de tabernaculo suo fiducia ejus,  et calcet super eum, quasi rex, interitus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִנָּתֵ֣ק מֵ֭אׇהֳלוֹ מִבְטַח֑וֹ וְ֝תַצְעִדֵ֗הוּ לְמֶ֣לֶךְ בַּלָּהֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let his confidence be rooted out of his tabernacle, and let destruction tread upon him like a king.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen toivonsa pitää revittämän ylös juurinensa hänen majastansa, ja hän pitää ajettaman pelkoin kuninkaan tykö.
verses.king_james: His confidence shall be rooted out of his tabernacle, and it shall bring him to the king of terrors.

verses.latin_vulgate: Habitent in tabernaculo illius socii ejus qui non est ;  aspergatur in tabernaculo ejus sulphur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תִּשְׁכּ֣וֹן בְּ֭אׇהֳלוֹ מִבְּלִיל֑וֹ יְזֹרֶ֖ה עַל־נָוֵ֣הוּ גׇפְרִֽית׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let the companions of him that is not, dwell in his tabernacle, let brimstone be sprinkled in his tent.
verses.finnish_biblia: Se on asuva hänen majassansa hänen puutteensa tähden: hänen majansa päälle pitää tulikiveä viskottaman.
verses.king_james: It shall dwell in his tabernacle, because it is none of his: brimstone shall be scattered upon his habitation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deorsum radices ejus siccentur :  sursum autem atteratur messis ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִ֭תַּחַת שׇׁרָשָׁ֣יו יִבָ֑שׁוּ וּ֝מִמַּ֗עַל יִמַּ֥ל קְצִירֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let his roots be dried up beneath, and his harvest destroyed above.
verses.finnish_biblia: Alhaalta pitää hänen juurensa kuivettuman, ja ylhäältä hänen elonsa niitettämän.
verses.king_james: His roots shall be dried up beneath, and above shall his branch be cut off.

verses.latin_vulgate: Memoria illius pereat de terra,  et non celebretur nomen ejus in plateis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זִֽכְרוֹ־אָ֭בַד מִנִּי־אָ֑רֶץ וְלֹא־שֵׁ֥ם ל֝֗וֹ עַל־פְּנֵי־חֽוּץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let the memory of him perish from the earth, and let not his name be renowned in the streets.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen muistonsa pitää hukkuman maan päältä, ja ei pidä ensinkään hänellä nimeä oleman kadulla.
verses.king_james: His remembrance shall perish from the earth, and he shall have no name in the street.

verses.latin_vulgate: Expellet eum de luce in tenebras,  et de orbe transferet eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֶ֭הְדְּפֻהוּ מֵא֣וֹר אֶל־חֹ֑שֶׁךְ וּֽמִתֵּבֵ֥ל יְנִדֻּֽהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He shall drive him out of light into darkness, and shall remove him out of the world.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän pitää ajettaman valkeudesta pimeyteen, ja pitää maalta heitettämän pois.
verses.king_james: He shall be driven from light into darkness, and chased out of the world.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non erit semen ejus, neque progenies in populo suo,  nec ullæ reliquiæ in regionibus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹ֘א־נִ֤ין ל֣וֹ וְלֹא־נֶ֣כֶד בְּעַמּ֑וֹ וְאֵ֥ין שָׂ֝רִ֗יד בִּמְגוּרָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: His seed shall not subsist, nor his offspring among his people, nor any remnants in his country.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei hänellä pidä yhtään lasta oleman, eikä lasten lasta hänen kanssansa; ja ei pidä yhtään hänen asuinsioihinsa jäämän.
verses.king_james: He shall neither have son nor nephew among his people, nor any remaining in his dwellings.

verses.latin_vulgate: In die ejus stupebunt novissimi,  et primos invadet horror.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־י֭וֹמוֹ נָשַׁ֣מּוּ אַחֲרֹנִ֑ים וְ֝קַדְמֹנִ֗ים אָ֣חֲזוּ שָֽׂעַר׃
verses.douay_rheims: They that come after him shall be astonished at his day, and horror shall fall upon them that went before.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ne jotka hänen perässänsä tulevat, pitää hämmästymän hänen päivästänsä, ja ne jotka hänen edellänsä ovat olleet, pitää peljästymän.
verses.king_james: They that come after him shall be astonied at his day, as they that went before were affrighted.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc sunt ergo tabernacula iniqui,  et iste locus ejus qui ignorat Deum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַךְ־אֵ֭לֶּה מִשְׁכְּנ֣וֹת עַוָּ֑ל וְ֝זֶ֗ה מְק֣וֹם לֹֽא־יָדַֽע־אֵֽל׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: These then are the tabernacles of the wicked, and this the place of him that knoweth not God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on jumalattoman maja, ja tämä on sen sia, joka ei Jumalasta mitään tiedä.
verses.king_james: Surely such are the dwellings of the wicked, and this is the place of him that knoweth not God.
